notes: Full dinner menu + drinks captured (snacks, bowls, sandwiches, plates, plus cocktails, NA cocktails, wine, cans). Happy-hour and kids sections omitted as discounted duplicates of the main menu. '*' on Steak Adobo is an undercooked-meat notice. No vegetarian/GF marks published. Wine carries glass/bottle pricing (glass in glass_cents, bottle in bottle_cents). 18 rotating drafts exist but were not enumerated.

dishes.name: Fresh Tortilla Chips & Salsa
dishes.description: Choose pineapple-habanero, tomatillo, arbol, or pico de gallo (+1 additional salsa).

dishes.name: Yard Quesadilla
dishes.description: Flour tortilla, cheese blend, refried beans, cilantro, onions, pico de gallo, crema, cotija; choice of pollo rojo, pork chile verde, carne asada, grilled veggie, or chorizo.

dishes.name: Chicken Wings
dishes.description: Buffalo, sweet & spicy, or bbq sauce; served with carrots, celery, ranch or blue cheese.

dishes.name: Shrimp Cocktail
dishes.description: 6 poached shrimp with salsa macha, pineapple habanero cocktail sauce, pickled red cabbage, lime.

dishes.name: Queso Fundido
dishes.description: Cheese with tomatillo salsa, rajas, choice of chorizo or mushroom.

dishes.name: Tacos Dorados
dishes.description: Pollo tinga, fried, topped with lettuce, pico de gallo, cotija, cilantro.

dishes.name: Cheese Crisp
dishes.description: Fried flour tortilla, cheese, pico de gallo.

dishes.name: Orange Chipotle Salad
dishes.description: (+7-9 protein options).

dishes.name: Cardini's Creation Salad
dishes.description: (+7-9 protein).

dishes.name: Ensalada Quesadilla
dishes.description: Flour tortilla with filling, cheese, onions, cilantro, beans, topped with greens, guacamole, crema.

dishes.name: Rice & Beans
dishes.description: Red rice, ancho beans, arbol salsa, pico de gallo, tortillas.

dishes.name: Crispy Chicken Sandwich
dishes.description: Panko-crusted, pickled shallot, lettuce, tomato, roasted garlic aioli; choice of buffalo, sweet & spicy, or bbq. Served with tortilla chips or fries.

dishes.name: Grilled Yard Bird
dishes.description: Herb-marinated chicken, guacamole, lettuce, tomato, bacon. Served with tortilla chips or fries.

dishes.name: Fishwich
dishes.description: Beer battered cod, cheddar, cabbage slaw, tartar sauce. Served with tortilla chips or fries.

dishes.name: Steak Sandwich
dishes.description: Steak, onions, peppers, swiss, arugula, chipotle aioli. Served with tortilla chips or fries.

dishes.name: Mushroom Kale Press
dishes.description: Sautéed mushrooms, kale, pickled jalapeños, corn/black bean salsa, cheese, chipotle aioli. Served with tortilla chips or fries.

dishes.name: Smash Burger
dishes.description: Two 3oz patties, American cheese, lettuce, tomato, pickles, pub sauce. Served with tortilla chips or fries.

dishes.name: Steak Adobo Plate
dishes.description: 6oz steak with adobo sauce, pico de gallo, ancho beans, smashed potatoes, grilled pepper/onion, tortillas.

dishes.name: Fish & Chips
dishes.description: Beer battered cod, fries, cabbage slaw, tartar sauce.

dishes.name: Sopes Chile Verde
dishes.description: Two masa rounds, smashed beans, pork chile verde, crema, cotija, slaw.

dishes.name: Arroz Con Pollo
dishes.description: Chicken breast, mushrooms, kale, cheese, red rice, tortillas.

dishes.name: Taco Plate
dishes.description: Two tacos, red rice, ancho beans, pickled vegetables, lime; protein options carne asada, carnitas, pollo rojo, pork chile verde, pescado, chorizo, beer battered fish, macha shrimp (+2), mushroom kale.

beverages.name: Yard Margarita
beverages.style: Libelula tequila, triple sec, fresh citrus, salted rim (+1 jalapeño, +2 Cadillac)

beverages.name: Fruity Rita
beverages.style: Yard Margarita with mango, watermelon, prickly pear, or strawberry (+1 jalapeño)

beverages.name: Scratch Rita
beverages.style: Corazon blanco tequila, lime juice, agave simple

beverages.name: Something Mezcal
beverages.style: Banhez mezcal, Ransom genepi, strawberry, orange liqueur, lemon

beverages.name: House Old Fashioned
beverages.style: James E. Pepper rye, demerara, coffee liqueur, chocolate bitters, orange

beverages.name: Spring Into Summer
beverages.style: pisco, elderflower, benedictine, lemon, sakura bitters

beverages.name: Gin & Jam
beverages.style: Citadelle Rouge gin, raspberry jam, lemon, triple sec

beverages.name: Michelada
beverages.style: michelada mix, lime, tajin rim, Modelo tall boy

beverages.name: Yard Margarita-ish
beverages.style: n/a tequila, Dhos Orange, fresh citrus, salted rim, lime wedge

beverages.name: Watermelon Margarita-ish
beverages.style: n/a tequila, watermelon, agave, chamoy, salt or tajin rim
